text.title: task-spec-kit-three-step Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for task-spec-kit-three-step as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent autopopulates `[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]` markers with plausible defaults to "make progress" instead of blocking on PM resolution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defaults stuffed into the spec become invisible assumptions in the merged code; the constitution's "test-first" gate cannot fail what it cannot see.

failure-mode.description: Agent waives a gate by writing "waived" without linking a CODEOWNER-signed issue ID, then generates tasks.md anyway.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unsigned waivers re-introduce silent assumptions; the next reviewer cannot tell if the bypass was approved or invented by the model.
